creative_brief: Clean, minimal layout. No hero image needed. Rachel's signature at the bottom in a handwritten-style font. Single CTA button: 'See the offer on Birchal' placed after the body, before the disclaimer paragraph.
subject: Your VIP spot is locked. Here's what that means.
preheader: On 22 June, you get a link. The public waits until the 23rd. Here's exactly how it works.
body:
Hi {first_name},

Someone asked me recently: "What does VIP actually get me?"

Fair question. So let me spell it out.

Your $5 refundable deposit locked your spot in the first group to see the FarmThru equity round. Not the waitlist. Not the queue. The first group.

Here's what happens:

On the evening of 22 June, you get an email with your Birchal link. The public round opens 23 June. That 24-hour head start is yours because you committed early, and early investors in community rounds like this often fill the first tranche before most people have even read the announcement.

You can invest from $50. The maximum is $10,000. You choose your amount when you're ready, and there's no pressure to decide tonight.

If you change your mind before the round opens, your $5 deposit comes straight back. No questions.

Over the next few weeks I'll send you a couple of notes: how the offer is structured, what we're building at the Brookvale hub, and which farms are already committed to supplying it. Real numbers, real names.

If anything comes up before then, just reply to this email. I read every one.

This is not financial advice. Consider seeking independent financial advice. Full details in the disclosure document on Birchal.
